known_limitations: Trained on single operating condition (FD001, sea level)
Does not capture temporal order (each cycle treated independently)
Sensitive to concept drift (RMSE +25.69 in corruption experiment)
recommended_conditions: Single operating condition (FD001-like). Sensor Health Score >= 70 (Quality Gate PASS).
not_recommended: Multi-condition environments (FD002/FD004) without condition normalization. Data with PSI > 0.2 on >30% of features.
data_quality_required: Quality Gate PASS (Sensor Health >= 70). Missing rate < 20%. No concept drift detected.
drift_sensitivity: Concept drift: CRITICAL (100% detection, retrain required). Sensor drift: MODERATE (80.1% recovery with PSI gate). Gaussian noise: LOW (72-79% recovery with smoothing).
